prompt:
Diagnose and fix mobile blank screen in C:\PuffcoBLE. Debug panel shows app.js loaded: NO. Multiple SW cache bumps have not fixed it.

Steps:
1. Read app.js and check for JS syntax errors — run node -e "require('fs').readFileSync('C:\\PuffcoBLE\\app.js','utf8')" to see if it parses. Look for unbalanced braces, missing functions, broken references especially in initMobileSwipeViews, initSwiper, switchToView.
2. Check if swiper.min.js exists in C:\PuffcoBLE.
3. Check if swiper.min.js is in sw.js APP_SHELL array.
4. Check the HTML structure of .app-views (should have .swiper class, .swiper-wrapper, .mobile-view.swiper-slide).
5. Check if desktop layout (>=701px) is broken — are cards still in .app-container?
6. Build a GUARANTEED safe fallback:
   a. index.html: Keep .app-container with all cards (connect-card, status-card, profiles-card, controls-grid, brightness-card, power-card) — do NOT move them. Keep .app-views wrappers EMPTY. Remove swiper.min.js reference.
   b. style.css mobile section (<=700px): Set .app-container { display: none !important }. Set .app-views { display: flex; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; height: calc(100vh - 120px - env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)); }. Set .mobile-view { flex: 0 0 100vw; scroll-snap-align: start; overflow-y: auto; padding: 12px 16px calc(68px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)); }.
   c. Desktop (>=701px): .app-views { display: none !important }, .app-container shown normally.
   d. app.js: Remove initMobileSwipeViews function. Remove initSwiper function. Remove _swiperInstance variable. Remove MOBILE_VIEW_MAP and VIEW_INDEX_MAP. Remove initMobileSwipeViews() call from init(). Remove setupViewScrollSync. Remove setupViewScrollSync and initMobileSwipeViews from window.app exports. Keep window.appSwitchToView but make it a no-op.
   e. sw.js: Bump CACHE_NAME date. Add swiper.min.js to APP_SHELL if missing.
   f. index.html: Update app.js?v=19 to app.js?v=20, style.css?v=14 to style.css?v=15, sw.js?t=07 to sw.js?t=08.
   g. Keep the inline debug script in index.html but update its force button to not call initMobileSwipeViews.
7. Commit with message: fix: mobile blank screen — pure CSS scroll-snap, no Swiper, guaranteed to work
8. Push to origin/main
9. Report the commit hash and what was changed.
